text: The ordeal is over. The bond is stronger than any plague. With a mighty beat of his restored wings,
Skyrith launches them from the mountains crown, shattering the last clouds in their path.
They rise, not into darkness, but into the glorious forgiving light of a new dawn.
Kale feels his heart beating straw beneath her. Here's the familiar, powerful roar that shakes the heavens.
The cold sickness is a memory, the shrine of fading silhouette below. They are whole. They are one.
And the sky once more belongs to them.
